reasoning: The network is experiencing significant performance degradation originating from the F1-U interface, leading to high latency and packet loss, impacting user plane traffic.
actionable_steps: 1. Check Transport Health: Verify physical and logical health of transport link between CU and DU. 2. Analyze Traffic Load: Check for traffic bursts or congestion on VLANs/subnets dedicated to F1-U traffic. 3. Verify Configuration: Ensure QoS settings on transport network correctly prioritize F1-U traffic. 4. Restart Interface/Session: Reset F1-U SCTP/GTP tunnels if software hang is suspected.
